config.alias: AC - Manual ON guard + presencia temporal
config.description: Contrato v1: guard de encendido manual con consolidación a 30s, flujo off->fan_only->cool (12s) y presencia temporal cuando corresponde. Presencia telefónica limitada a `device_tracker.samsung_s24` y `person.ivan`.

variables.last_auto_age_s: {% set raw = last_auto_ts_raw | default('', true) | trim %}{% if raw | lower in ['unknown','unavailable','none',''] %}99999{% else %}{% set ts_auto = as_timestamp(raw, default=none) %}{{ 99999 if ts_auto is none else ((as_timestamp(now()) - ts_auto) | round(1)) }}{% endif %}

variables.trigger_id: {{ trigger.id if trigger is defined and trigger.id is defined else 'unknown' }}

variables.last_manual_on_pending_signature_saved_t: {% set raw = last_manual_on_pending_signature %}{% if '|saved_ts=' in raw %}{% set after = raw.split('|saved_ts=')[1] %}{% set ts = after.split('|')[0] %}{{ ts | int(0) }}{% else %}0{% endif %}
